headline: Assessing Rockwell Automation (ROK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Planned US$2b Investment
summary: Without a specific news event driving Rockwell Automation (ROK) today, the focus turns to how its recent share performance and financial profile might influence how you think about the stock. See our latest analysis for Rockwell Automation. The recent 3.30% 1 day share price gain to $436.23 comes after a mixed few weeks, with a 7 day share price return of 4.12%, a 90 day share price return of 10.33%, and a 1 year total shareholder return of 46.15% pointing to stronger momentum over a longer...

headline: What Makes Rockwell Automation (ROK) a High-Quality Compounder?
summary: Alpha Wealth Funds, LLC, an investment management company, released its Q1 2025 letter for the “Insiders Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund lost 7.14% in the quarter, tied to a 6.75% fall in March due to the War in Iran. This compares to the S&P 500’s -4.33% return for […]

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Rockwell Automation (ROK) Elevating AI And Cybersecurity In Smart Manufacturing
summary: In early May 2026, Rockwell Automation released new global and UK findings from its 11th annual State of Smart Manufacturing report, showing manufacturers are moving from pilots to active deployment of smart technologies, with AI and cybersecurity now central to digital transformation efforts. The report reinforces Rockwell Automation’s role as a key enabler of smart manufacturing, highlighting how rising AI-supported operations and real-time data adoption are reshaping industrial execution,...
